case_title: NASIR PATEL VS. ERNIE BYRON CARTER JR.

docket_entries.description: UNLAWFUL DETAINER - RESIDENTIAL, COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF PATEL, NASIR AS TO DEFENDANT CARTER JR., ERNIE BYRON SUMMONS ISSUED, JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED
